focal_points: Title text 'How to Start Making Real Money With Skills & Agents' in the top-left quadrant
Central brain icon acting as the core of the diagram
The man working on a laptop in the bottom-right
composition.visual_hierarchy: The eye is first drawn to the large title on the left, then moves to the central 'brain' icon, and then follows the lines radiating outwards to the various skill and income stream categories, finally resting on the man at the laptop as the implied agent.
composition.balance: asymmetric - the heavy text block on the left is balanced by the detailed diagram and the human figure on the right, creating a dynamic visual flow.

shadows.placement: under objects and subject for depth

highlights.placement: on metallic elements like coins and laptop

lighting.ambient_fill: present - secondary fill light reducing shadows

technical_specs.depth_of_field: deep - all elements are in focus, creating a clear informational graphic

artistic_elements.atmosphere: An informative and clear atmosphere, designed to convey a business concept effectively.

typography.placement: overlay - title and subtitle on the left, labels integrated into the diagram on the right
typography.integration: dominant - the text is crucial for understanding the diagram's content

subject_analysis.primary_subject: An illustrated diagram explaining how to make money with skills and agents, centered around a brain icon.
subject_analysis.positioning: The title is in the top-left, the central diagram element (brain) is slightly left of center, and the illustrative figure is in the bottom-right.
subject_analysis.interaction: The diagram elements are interconnected by lines, illustrating relationships between skills, products, and income streams. The man interacts with a laptop, symbolizing the 'agent' or 'skill' application.

hair.details: A short, dark brown beard and mustache are present. The head is covered by a dark grey bandana with a lighter grey pattern, tied at the back.

hands_and_gestures.left_hand: Fingers are positioned over the laptop keyboard, appearing to be typing.
hands_and_gestures.right_hand: Fingers are positioned over the laptop keyboard, appearing to be typing.
hands_and_gestures.interaction: Both hands are actively typing on a silver laptop keyboard.

background.spatial_depth: shallow - elements are layered but without significant environmental depth

Grey cylindrical database with a human head silhouette
Grey cardboard box with a golden gear inside
Grey cardboard box with a golden gear on the side
Two hands shaking, one light-skinned, one darker-skinned
Green sphere with a code tag icon and radiating lines

Golden coin with a dollar sign

Bearded man wearing a bandana and a brown jacket, sitting at a desk

background.objects_catalog: Starburst icon (top-left), Brain icon (center-left), Folder icon (top-left of brain), Database icon (mid-left of brain), Robot icon (bottom-left of brain), Open box icon (top-right of brain), Closed box icon (mid-right of brain), Handshake icon (bottom-right of brain), Two gear icons (right of handshake), API icon (bottom-center of brain), Money bag icon (top-right of diagram), Credit card icon (mid-right of diagram), Two dollar coin icons (top-right and bottom-right of diagram), Silver laptop (bottom-right), Man (bottom-right).
background.background_treatment: minimal - a solid light beige color with a subtle paper-like texture

prompts: Infographic illustration of business concepts, clean vector style, light beige background, dark brown text, golden accents, professional and educational tone, diagram with interconnected elements, stylized icons, man working on laptop.
Conceptual diagram showing skill monetization pathways, digital art, clear visual hierarchy, modern design, subtle paper texture, flat colors with minimal shading, business education.

generation_parameters.post_processing: Subtle paper texture overlay, slight color grading to warm tones.
